overview: Based on the published agenda, this special meeting of the Wausau School District Board of Education was scheduled to address potential litigation matters in closed session. The board was expected to convene under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g), which permits closed sessions for preliminary discussion regarding potential litigation, before potentially reconvening in open session to take any necessary action.

agenda.item: Request for Closed Session Pursuant to State Statutes
Reconvene in Open Session, to take further action if necessary and appropriate

discussions.body: The board was scheduled to enter closed session under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g) to discuss preliminary matters regarding potential litigation. This statute allows governmental bodies to meet privately when consulting with legal counsel about litigation strategy or potential legal action involving the district.
Following the closed session discussion, the board was expected to reconvene in open session to take any further action deemed necessary and appropriate based on the closed session deliberations.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on entering closed session pursuant to State Statute 19.85(g)
Board may have been expected to take action following closed session deliberations regarding potential litigation
title: Special Meeting - 2026-05-18
